div1.entryFree:
Empty, vb. 1) to deprive of the contents: Wiv. III, 3, 15. IV, 2, 149. As V, 1, 47. R2 II, 2, 130. H4A I, 3, 86. H4A I, 3, 86 H4B II, 4, 37. With of: --ing our bosoms of their counsel, Mids. I, 1, 216. old receptacles of filth, Per. IV, 6, 185.
2) to make vacant: the untimely --ing of the happy throne, Mcb. IV, 3, 68.
3) to pour out, to discharge: --ed all their fountains in my well, Compl. 255. --es itself into the main of waters, Merch. V, 96. the --ing of our fathers' luxury, H5 III, 5, 6 (== the efflux, issue).
